meaning: n.酸度,酸性,[医]酸过多,胃酸过多
examples: Our speciality here are Italian wines, and these tend to be fruity with medium acidity.
The proportion of free oleic acid that an olive oil contains is an accurate measure of the oil's acidity.
She is investigating the effects of changing acidity and temperature in the sea on a creature called the purple sea urchin.
The best ones carry an edge of acidity that cuts through butter or batter or fatty burger.
The fruit, though dripping with sweet juices, has enough acidity to cut through the cheese's richness.
